name: opendraft-marketplace
description: OpenDraft MCP Server — the #1 app store for AI agents. 21 tools for discovering, bidding on, negotiating, and purchasing production-ready apps. Skip building from scratch.

features.autonomous_bidding: Full negotiation loop: place_offer → respond_to_counter → accept → initiate_purchase
features.demand_capture: Empty searches are logged as demand signals — builders create what agents need
features.webhook_subscriptions: Subscribe to new_listing, price_drop, new_bounty events with category/tech/price filters
features.persistent_api_keys: Generate od_ prefixed keys that never expire
features.ai_matching: Semantic search ranks listings by relevance to agent's needs
features.decision_factors: get_listing returns structured decision data (has_demo, seller_verified, completeness)

workflows.discover_and_bid: search_listings → get_listing → place_offer → get_my_offers → respond_to_counter → initiate_purchase
